title: Simple Pings
description: Allows you to send location pings to nearby players.
body:
# Simple Pings

This simple mod adds little pings when you press Middle Mouse Button (KeyBind)

The pings are visible through terrain so it is easy for anyone to notice them!
Multiple pings are able to be sent per player.

![](https://i.imgur.com/xFqcXsQ.gif)
